# transcode-service

> HTTP API for video transcoding via NVIDIA NVENC hardware encoder (GB10 Blackwell).
> Built for batch transcoding of media libraries. Async jobs with polling pattern.

## Base URL

https://transcode.agi-so.fr

## Authentication

HTTP Basic Auth. Credentials transmitted out-of-band by the operator.
Header format: `Authorization: Basic <base64(user:password)>`

## Documentation

- [API spec for agents](https://transcode.agi-so.fr/agents.md): complete TypeScript types, client class, endpoint specs, error codes, performance reference, retry strategy. **Read this first.**
- [README](https://transcode.agi-so.fr/readme.md): human-readable overview, architecture diagram.

## Endpoints (quick reference)

- `GET    /`                 service descriptor (auto-discovery)
- `GET    /health`           liveness check
- `GET    /codecs`           list NVENC encoders + supported params
- `POST   /jobs`             multipart upload + start transcode job
- `GET    /jobs`             list all jobs
- `GET    /jobs/{id}`        get job state + progress (poll this)
- `GET    /jobs/{id}/output` streaming download transcoded file
- `DELETE /jobs/{id}`        cleanup job

## Optional

- [Bash client wrapper](https://transcode.agi-so.fr/transcode-api-client.sh): sourceable bash function `transcode_via_api`
